summary: The diff implements all requested requirements for the Careers section. The Careers component is positioned above the Footer in App.tsx, includes the requested company culture introduction with 'Join Our Team' headline, displays all 5 specified job positions with job titles, descriptions, locations, and 'Apply Now' buttons styled with golden yellow accents. IntersectionObserver animations with staggered fade-in effects are implemented. The Navigation component includes the 'Careers' link in the correct position (before Contact) in both desktop and mobile menus with smooth scroll functionality. All acceptance criteria appear to be met based on the available evidence.

hallucinated_features.description: Footer includes 'Careers' in Quick Links navigation
hallucinated_features.reason: The Footer.tsx modification shows 'Careers' added to the Quick Links array, but this was not explicitly requested in the BuildRequest. REQ-16 only specified updating the Navigation component, not the Footer.
The Careers.tsx component includes an h3 element with text 'Current Openings' styled with golden yellow color. This specific subheading was not mentioned in the BuildRequest requirements.

hallucinated_features.description: Job cards include Briefcase icon from Lucide React
hallucinated_features.reason: Each job card displays a Briefcase icon, which was not explicitly requested in the requirements. While the constraint mentions using Lucide React icons consistent with other sections, the specific icon choice for job cards was not specified.
